title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
